topics: System Modelling: Develop a model for the selected system from fundamental conservation principles
Block Diagram Development: Develop a feedback control system using the concept of block diagram development and reduction
Controller Selection: Select a suitable controller for the process
Simulation: Implement the system model and controller in MATLAB or Simulink and simulate the response (Self-study)
Stability Analysis: Analyse the stability of the system using methods like Routh-Hurwitz Criterion, Root Locus method, Bode stability criterion, etc.
Controller Tuning: Optimize the control parameter for desired performance using Ziegler-Nichols tuning
Validation by Experimental Data: Conduct experiment in the laboratory and evaluate the system performance with the experimental data
Report Preparation and Oral Presentation: Prepare a detailed report and presentation before the evaluation committee
